nasb.text: but you have risen against my father’s house today and have killed his sons, seventy men, on one stone, and have made Abimelech, the son of his maidservant, king over the men of Shechem, because he is your relative—

esv.text: and you have risen up against my father’s house this day and have killed his sons, seventy men on one stone, and have made Abimelech, the son of his female servant, king over the leaders of Shechem, because he is your relative—

cnv.text: 今日你們竟起來攻擊我的父家，在一塊石頭上殺了他七十個兒子，又立了他的婢女所生的兒子亞比米勒作示劍人的王，因為他原是你們的親族。

ccb.text: 现在你们却背叛我父亲家，在一块磐石上杀死他七十个儿子。因为他婢女的儿子亚比米勒是你们的亲戚，你们就立亚比米勒为王。
